description: Periodically mark an area near the Siphoner's target, exposing enemies to armor loss and reduced healing.
tooltipTemplate: While in combat, every {cooldownSeconds:1}s the Siphoner automatically marks enemies within {radius:0} of its current foe. Marked enemies lose {armorReduction:0} armor and receive {healingReceivedMultiplier%} of incoming healing for {durationSeconds:1}s. Costs {manaCost:0} mana per pulse.
